testcase.name: DailyProgressViewModel entries are sorted descending by timestamp
SummariesViewModel switches to 28-day period when tab changed
DailyProgressViewModel shows null plan and zero totals when no plan configured
SummariesViewModel produces NoPlan state when no plan configured for any day
SummariesViewModel calculates correct daily average for 7-day period
SummariesViewModel produces Content state with correct totalTarget when plan is fully configured
DailyProgressViewModel combines plan and entries from repository into Content state
